validationRule.code: C_Project.projectstatus in ('OP', 'OR') and (C_Project.c_bpartner_id=@C_BPartner_ID@ or '@IsSOTrx@'='N') or C_Project.c_project_id = @c_project_id@

fields.name: lineNo
fields.label: Line No.

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_InOutLine WHERE M_InOut_ID=@M_InOut_ID@

fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_InOutLine WHERE M_InOut_ID=@M_InOut_ID@

validationRule.code: td0.c_uom_id IN(select p.c_uom_id from m_product p where p.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@) or td0.c_uom_id IN(select a.c_uom_id from m_product_aum a where a.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@ and ((@IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' and a.sales <> 'NA') OR (@IsSOTrx@ <> 'Y' and a.purchase <> 'NA')))

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_InOutLine WHERE M_InOut_ID=@M_InOut_ID@
